name: core-module-of-the-plugin-market
displayName: Core Module of the Plugin Market
author: monthzifang
description: Core market module for the original Mindustry server. It syncs the Git market, scans registry files, and installs plugins.
descriptionZh: 用于 Mindustry 原版服务端的插件市场核心模块，可同步 Git 市场、扫描登记文件并安装插件。
